notes: Figma main component exposes boolean properties for leading toggle, leading icon, badge, trailing toggle, placeholder, and divider.
Samples repeat plus/minus, chevron up/down, bordered, divider, stretched arrow, active content bordered, and nested structures.
Runtime stays Radix-based; design props are added on top of Radix primitive props.

props.name: indicatorPosition
props.source: Leading Toggle Icon / Trailing Toggle Icon
props.description: Controls whether the toggle icon appears before the title, after the title, both, or not at all.

props.name: indicatorVariant
props.source: Leading Toggle Icon Swap / Trailing Toggle Swap
props.description: Maps repeated Figma icon swaps to a small public icon family.

props.name: density
props.description: Controls trigger height and vertical rhythm.

props.name: leading
props.description: Optional icon or visual before the title.

props.name: badge
props.description: Optional badge shown next to the title.

props.name: divider
props.description: Controls whether each item renders its top divider.

props.name: inset
props.description: Controls content alignment under the trigger.

props.name: content variant
props.description: Controls whether expanded content appears as a bordered panel.

examples.title: Basic usage
notes: Compact rows, start indicator, no bordered shell.

examples.title: Bordered
notes: Card shell with dividers and active content.

examples.title: Divider
notes: Chevron indicator with visible item separators.

examples.title: With title and arrow stretched
notes: End-positioned chevron stretches away from the title.

examples.title: Active Content bordered
notes: Expanded body appears as a bordered card.

examples.title: Nested
notes: Nested accordion rows inside active content.

validation.visualComparison: sanity checked against Figma Accordion Examples content render; pixel-perfect comparison not performed
